<center>

## Honors & Awards

</center>

<div style="text-align: right;">

> **Colegio Madrid (CCH curriculum)** · 2024

</div>

<left>

### Graduated with Honors

Graduated with honors after completing the *CCH* curriculum at Colegio Madrid, in recognition of outstanding academic performance throughout high school.

</left>

---

<div style="text-align: right;">

> **Mexico City Biology Olympiad (OCaBi)** · 2023

</div>

<left>

### Gold Medalist

Awarded the **Gold Medal** at the **Mexico City Biology Olympiad** after advancing through the state-level selection process. The Olympiad covered topics including genetics, molecular biology, ecology, evolution, physiology, plant biology, developmental biology, and biochemistry.

</left>
